name: @selfos/relay
description: SelfOS zero-knowledge relay (08-questionnaires §5.4): a self-contained Cloudflare Worker that is a ciphertext-only mailbox + a branded, WCAG answering page. The app provisions + deploys it per household; the Worker stores only ciphertext (questions decrypt via the URL-fragment content key, responses seal to the send public key — neither key ever reaches the server). Built to a single dist/worker.js the app uploads.
